message:
fix(fcp-mesh): clarify session benchmark naming

Rename `session_verify_incoming_1kb` to `session_mac_roundtrip_1kb`
to accurately reflect that the benchmark measures both MAC generation
and verification together.

Add comment explaining this is intentional: replay protection requires
unique sequence numbers, making isolated verification benchmarking
impractical. The actual verify_incoming call is ~1.5µs; the rest is
mac_outgoing overhead.

Also simplify keys setup by reusing the same SessionKeys instance
instead of defining identical duplicate keys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
